summary: Comprehensive testing of GitHub-merged features: Login with tenant selector, Role Management CRUD, Platform Admin, Tenant Settings, Tenant Registration, Designations. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 401 Unauthorized without authentication - expected behavior change from previous version

seed_data_creation: Test tenants created during test suite execution (test-reg-*, test-info-*, test-login-*, test-gws-*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from GitHub merge verified working: Login with tenant selector (6 tenants available), Role Management with 4 system roles (Admin, Manager, User, Viewer), Platform Admin with 6 tenants/28 users, Tenant Settings with 6 tabs (Company, Branding, Modules, Roles, Designations, Settings), Tenant Registration with workspace creation form, 12 Designations. Test credentials in test_credentials field.

login_with_tenant_selector.details: Tenant dropdown shows 6 organizations, login successful with CEO credentials, redirects to /home

role_management_crud.details: GET /api/roles returns 5 roles with permissions, POST creates custom roles, PUT updates permissions, DELETE removes custom roles (system roles protected)

platform_admin.details: GET /api/platform-admin/tenants returns all tenants (6 total), stats show 28 total users, access control working (regular admins denied)

tenant_settings.details: 6 tabs working: Company, Branding, Modules, Roles, Designations, Settings. Role Management shows permission matrix with expandable categories

tenant_registration.details: Registration form shows Company Name, Workspace URL, Admin Account fields. Subdomain validation working.

designations_endpoint.details: GET /api/designations returns 12 designations with department, level, type fields

multi_tenant_isolation.details: X-Tenant-ID header required for all API calls, users only see their tenant's data
